summary: Joel shares his excitement about Dave Winer writing a foreword for his book, expressing deep gratitude. He then humorously describes his day as a battle with his copy editor over comma placement, illustrating the back-and-forth with Word's revision tracking feature.
key_points: Dave Winer wrote a foreword for Joel's book that Joel considers perfect
Joel is in the editing phase of book publication, dealing with copy editing
The comedic tug-of-war over commas illustrates the tension between author voice and editorial convention
money_quotes: My copy editor keeps deleting my commas. I keep putting them back.
That's the theme of the day!
key_insight: Even in professional writing, the editing process becomes a humorous battle of wills between author and copy editor over minor stylistic choices like comma placement.
